HomeAboutProductsContact
AR

Compliance & Security

Our products are designed from day one to meet Kingdom regulatory requirements.

NDMO

National Data Management Office

Adherence to data governance and classification controls per NDMO requirements.

PDPL

Personal Data Protection Law

Personal data processing aligned with Saudi PDPL.

NCA ECC

Essential Cybersecurity Controls

Essential cybersecurity controls issued by the National Cybersecurity Authority.

SAMA

Central Bank Framework

SAMA Cybersecurity Framework for the financial sector.

Security Architecture

  • Encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).
  • Role-based access control (RBAC) with mandatory MFA.
  • Immutable audit logs for all sensitive operations.
  • Per-tenant data isolation at the platform level.
  • Hosted in certified Kingdom data centers (OCI Jeddah).
  • Periodic security reviews and annual penetration tests.
